title: Tamil Nadu horror: 10-year-old girl abducted on way to shop, found dead; locals stage protest
content: Police arrested a 33-year-old man, Karthik, in Coimbatore for the kidnapping and murder of a 10-year-old girl. The girl went missing on Thursday and was found dead on Friday. Karthik allegedly abducted her on a two-wheeler. His aide, Mohan Raj, was also detained. Protests demanding strict action were held, and officials assured a thorough investigation.

title: Bengal govt removes Mamata govt-designed football-themed sculpture from Salt Lake Stadium
content: West Bengal's Sports Minister Nisith Pramanik announced the removal of a controversial football-themed sculpture outside Salt Lake Stadium. Installed in 2017, the structure, featuring giant footballing legs merging into the Biswa Bangla logo, was criticized for its aesthetics and symbolism. The minister stated it would be dismantled soon, linking its installation to the previous government's decline.

title: Cockroach Janta Party website taken down: Founder calls govt 'dictatorial'
content: Abhijeet Dipke, founder of the viral Cockroach Janta Party, announced their website was taken down, accusing the BJP-led Centre of dictatorial behavior. Dipke claimed nearly 10 lakh people had joined the satirical platform, with 6 lakh signing a petition for the Education Minister's resignation over the NEET-UG controversy.

title: Not RCB or SRH! Historic playoff results make this team favourite for title
content: IPL 2026 playoffs are set to be exciting. Gujarat Titans hold a statistical edge to win the title. Royal Challengers Bengaluru finished first but history favors second-placed teams. Sunrisers Hyderabad face a tough Eliminator route. The final stages promise intense competition for the coveted IPL trophy.

title: 'No idea why I keep going viral': BJP MP Ravi Kishan reacts to 'home-from-work' slip-up
content: Actor-turned-politician Ravi Kishan clarified a viral "home-from-work" slip-up, explaining he meant "work from home" while discussing PM Modi's appeal amid rising fuel costs. He expressed bewilderment at his statements becoming internet sensations, stating he's just a human who makes mistakes like anyone else.

title: Full breakdown of USCIS memo on change in Green Card rules for H1-B, L-1, F-1 OPT
content: USCIS has issued a new policy memo requiring most foreigners seeking a green card to apply from their home country, shifting from adjustment of status within the U.S. This stricter standard emphasizes weighing negative factors like immigration violations and inconsistent conduct, demanding stronger evidence of "unusual or outstanding" positive ties to the U.S. for those applying domestically.

title: Hyderabad, Kolkata, Mumbai among India’s most expensive cities for fuel
content: Petrol and diesel prices saw a significant increase of 87-91 paise per litre on Saturday, marking a cumulative rise of nearly Rs 5 in under 10 days. This hike by state-owned oil companies reflects rising international crude prices, tightening refining margins, and a weaker rupee, which have escalated import costs.

title: Lost dad at 3, mom's belief stayed: Aravindh's rise to becoming first Indian at EWC 2026
content: Aravindh Chithambaram recently became the first Indian to qualify for the 2026 Esports Chess World Cup after winning at DreamHack Atlanta. Raised by his mother and grandparents after losing his father at age three, Aravindh discovered chess through his grandfather. With strong family support and guidance from coach RB Ramesh, he steadily rose through the ranks to become a national champion and elite player.

title: Transformer blast, metro halt and sleepless night: What caused Gurgaon’s massive blackout
content: A transformer blast at a Gurgaon substation plunged vast areas into darkness, highlighting the strain on NCR's power grid amidst extreme heat and record demand. The incident disrupted services, impacting thousands of residents and underscoring the challenges of managing escalating electricity needs during heatwaves.

title: Mark Zuckerberg's email to employees has a 'goodbye note' for those laid off
content: Meta has initiated significant layoffs, sending emails to thousands of employees whose positions are being eliminated.  Company leadership confirmed the decision to reduce headcount for increased efficiency.  Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg also sent a company-wide memo expressing gratitude to departing employees and outlining future company direction.  He assured remaining staff that no further company-wide layoffs are expected this year.

title: From BJP MLAs to Akhilesh and Mayawati, leaders raise alarm over UP power cuts
content: Uttar Pradesh is grappling with a severe power crisis this summer, prompting a wave of complaints from across the political spectrum. MLAs from both ruling and opposition parties, along with former CM Akhilesh Yadav and MP Chandra Shekhar Azad, have written to the energy minister highlighting widespread outages and public distress.

title: Tamil Nadu CM Vijay receives special Virat Kohli gift, photo goes viral
content: C. Joseph Vijay, now Tamil Nadu Chief Minister, went viral after receiving a cricket bat signed by Virat Kohli during a meeting with MRF officials. Fans praised Vijay’s stylish appearance in the photos. The moment comes shortly after his political victory and ahead of the delayed release of his film Jana Nayagan.

title: Gukesh under scrutiny as Russian GM questions world champion’s form
content: Ian Nepomniachtchi criticised reigning world champion D Gukesh for inconsistent performances, saying nearly every top GM currently has a strong chance against him. Nepomniachtchi also backed Javokhir Sindarov as favourite for their 2026 World Championship clash, citing his strong form and higher rating. Gukesh, meanwhile, has taken a break from classical chess to prepare for his title defence.

title: Who is Rukmini Vasanth? ‘Kantara: Chapter 1’ actor and daughter of Uri martyr
content: Rukmini Vasanth, daughter of martyred Army officer Colonel Vasanth Venugopal, is gaining wider recognition for her role as Kanakavathi in 'Kantara: Chapter 1'. Her journey from a family steeped in military service to a career in Kannada cinema highlights a unique blend of discipline and artistic pursuit.

title: 84% students show self-management skills, but parents put academics first: Study
content: A social experiment conducted by Glendale International School in Hyderabad reveals a growing emphasis on behavioural learning alongside academics. Across Grades 1 to 9, 84% of students demonstrated self-management, while others showed strong initiative, collaboration, and planning skills. However, a perception gap emerged—parents focused on academic outcomes, whereas students highlighted life skills like responsibility and listening. The findings suggest that behavioural competencies are becoming integral to classroom learning, even if they remain under-recognised in traditional evaluation systems.

title: FIR against UP Congress chief Ajay Rai for abusing PM Modi
content: An FIR has been registered against UP Congress chief Ajay Rai and others in Mahoba for allegedly making derogatory remarks against PM Modi and violating public order. The complaint cites a gathering at a private residence without permission, causing traffic disruption and inciting discord. Police are verifying allegations and video evidence.

title: Lucknow doctor arrested for raping Class 12th student after giving sedative injection inside OT
content: A 30-year-old doctor has been arrested for allegedly raping a 20-year-old patient in a Lucknow private hospital's operation theatre. The incident occurred after the doctor sedated the woman, who was admitted for epilepsy. Following swift intervention by the deputy chief minister, the hospital was sealed and proceedings to suspend the doctor's license initiated.

title: Kidnapped, tied up for 3 days, starved: Volleyball player killed over relationship in Faridabad
content: A 21-year-old volleyball player from Rajasthan was allegedly kidnapped and beaten to death by the family of a minor girl he was reportedly involved with. The victim was held captive for three days, starved, and assaulted before being found in a critical condition and later dying in the hospital. Police have registered an FIR and detained two suspects.

title: Twisha's family alleges planned surrender by husband Samarth
content: Twisha Sharma's family alleges her husband Samarth Singh's surrender was a "well-planned conspiracy." They claim he strategically withdrew bail, surrendered at 2:30 am amidst chaos, and family was barred from the police station. A second post-mortem has been permitted, but its execution remains undecided, with the family urging swift action.

title: Root breaks silence on chasing Sachin Tendulkar's record: 'I can’t ignore it'
content: Joe Root expressed immense admiration for Sachin Tendulkar's record Test run tally, acknowledging the impossibility of ignoring conversations about surpassing it.  Despite nearing the milestone, Root prioritizes continuous batting improvement over statistical achievements, aiming to play instinctively in matches.

title: ‘Beauty alone cannot feed family’: Why Uttarakhand’s villages are falling silent
content: Uttarakhand faces a growing 'ghost village' crisis as over 1,700 villages become uninhabited. Livelihood scarcity, climate change, and fading traditions drive migration, leaving behind elderly residents and silent fields. Experts emphasize the need for imaginative solutions beyond infrastructure to revive rural life and make villages aspirational again.

title: 90 killed in gas explosion at coal mine in China’s Shanxi province
content: A devastating gas explosion at the Liushenyu coal mine in northern China's Shanxi province has claimed the lives of at least 90 miners. The blast occurred Friday evening, with carbon monoxide levels reportedly exceeding limits prior to the incident. Rescue operations are ongoing as President Xi Jinping has ordered a full-scale rescue and a thorough investigation.

title: Kohli vs Head: What led to viral 'no handshake' between two IPL stars
content: Tempers flared between Virat Kohli and Travis Head during an IPL 2026 match, escalating into a post-match handshake snub. After a verbal exchange on the field, Kohli notably ignored Head's outstretched hand during the customary greetings, despite warmly acknowledging other SRH players.

title: Three Army officers survive chopper crash in Leh, court of inquiry under way
content: In a remarkable turn of events, three Indian Army officers, including a General Officer Commanding, survived a harrowing helicopter crash in the vicinity of Leh. This incident sheds light on the pressing need to upgrade the Army's aging aircraft fleet.

title: Twisha's husband Samarth Singh’s legal licence suspended
content: The Bar Council of India has suspended advocate Samarth Singh from legal practice immediately following allegations of dowry death of his wife, model-turned-actor Twisha Sharma. The council cited the grave nature of accusations impacting the legal profession's dignity. Singh, who had been absconding, surrendered and was taken into custody.

title: 'No access to any of our platforms': Cockroach Janta Party Instagram page hacked
content: Cockroach Janata Party founder Abhijeet Dipke reported his Instagram and other social media accounts were hacked, days after his satirical campaign went viral. The movement, inspired by remarks allegedly made by the Chief Justice of India, gained significant traction online. Dipke had previously claimed to have received death threats.

title: Twisha visited salon, got head massage before death; CCTV captures final hours
content: New CCTV footage reveals Twisha Sharma at a beauty salon before her death. Investigators are examining her final hours. Twisha's family alleges dowry harassment. A second post-mortem has been ordered. The case is now with the CBI for an independent probe. Her husband has been arrested.

title: Criticised, mocked, viral: Akash's long wait behind IPL’s 'chit' celebration
content: Akash Maharaj Singh’s viral ‘chit’ celebration became one of IPL 2026’s most debated moments, drawing criticism, trolling and even mockery from fellow cricketers. But behind the celebration was years of frustration, waiting and perseverance across four IPL franchises. From taking 10 wickets in an innings as a teenager to finally earning his chance at LSG, this is the emotional story behind Akash’s moment in the spotlight.

title: 'Fleecing its own citizens': Cong slams Modi govt for fuel price increase by Rs 5 in 9 days
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi faced sharp criticism from Congress for a third fuel price hike in ten days, with the party labeling him "Mehengai Man" Modi.  Accusations claim the government prioritizes oil companies over citizens, raising petrol and diesel prices again.  This move, impacting ordinary people, contrasts with global relief efforts, sparking concerns about benefiting capitalists.

title: 'Take the next plane': Vaughan asks Bethell to leave IPL before playoffs
content: Michael Vaughan has advised Jacob Bethell to return to England from the IPL due to injury concerns and limited playing time with Royal Challengers Bengaluru. Vaughan believes Bethell should prioritize his recovery and England's upcoming Test series against New Zealand, especially with a national training camp starting soon.

title: CNG prices hiked third time, sees increase by Re 1 per kg - check rates in your city
content: CNG prices have seen a third hike in under ten days, now costing Rs 81.09 per kg in Delhi. This follows recent increases in petrol and diesel prices, driven by surging global crude oil costs due to Middle East tensions. Transport operators are protesting, demanding fare revisions and a rollback of fuel surcharges.

title: Petrol, diesel prices hiked third time, sees increase by around 90 paise — check rates in your city
content: Fuel prices have seen a third hike in under 10 days as global crude oil prices surge due to the West Asia conflict and Strait of Hormuz disruptions. State-run oil companies are facing significant losses, prompting these revisions after a period of unchanged prices. India is taking steps to secure energy supplies and urges citizens to conserve fuel.

title: IRGC-trained Iraqi arrested over assassination plot against Trump's daughter Ivanka
content: An IRGC-trained operative, allegedly seeking revenge for Qasem Soleimani's death, was arrested in Turkey and extradited to the US. Mohammad Baqer Saad Dawood Al-Saadi is accused of plotting to assassinate Ivanka Trump, even possessing a blueprint of her Florida home. He reportedly made threats against Americans online.

title: 'Poor thing': Iran mocks Trump as viral buffalo resembling him loses appetite
content: Iran's official account in Russia shared a viral video of a Bangladeshi albino buffalo resembling Donald Trump, claiming the animal lost its appetite due to the comparison amid ongoing US-Iran conflict. The buffalo, named 'Donald Trump', has become a local attraction ahead of Eid al-Adha festivities.

title: Delhi HC slams WFI for calling Vinesh Phogat Olympic exit national shame
content: The Delhi High Court strongly criticized the Wrestling Federation of India (WFI) for its stance on Vinesh Phogat's Olympic 2024 disqualification, calling it a "national shame." The court vowed to ensure Phogat's participation in upcoming Asian Games trials, deeming WFI's selection policy "absolutely retrograde" and potentially discriminatory.

title: BRS leader found dead in gunny bag in Telangana's Suryapet
content: A local BRS leader, Chinthalapadi Madhu, was discovered deceased inside a gunny bag near Yerkaram stage in Suryapet district. Police suspect foul play, with the 42-year-old reportedly murdered before his body was abandoned. Madhu had a prior murder case from 2008. Authorities are investigating and searching for the perpetrators.

title: U.P. STF busts SSC exam-rigging racket in Greater Noida; seven held
content: The accused were allegedly manipulating SSC examinations for recruitment of constables in the CAPF, and SSF, and riflemen in the Assam Rifles, at an online examination centre operating under the name "Balaji Digital Zone" in the Knowledge Park area

title: Leadership crisis, 'loot' in BJP govt., says Congress chief Kharge after third fuel price hike
content: The Congress chief cited the example of Italy saying it cut excise on fuel, giving their people some relief, while Australia reduced excise duty, slashing petrol prices by about ₹17 per litre for citizens

title: Centre asks Delhi Gymkhana Club to hand over premises by June 5
content: Land and Development Office’s order stated that the land is essential to fulfil urgent institutional needs, governance infrastructure and public interest project

title: Sulur minor girl abduction and murder: Law and order a serious concern in T.N., says Udhayanidhi Stalin
content: He said those responsible for the abduction and murder of a minor girl in Sulur, near Coimbatore, should be swiftly brought to justice and punished

title: NCW takes cognisance of teen's killing over suspected interfaith relationship
content: NCW Chairperson Vijaya Rahatkar has written to the Director General of Police, Uttar Pradesh, directing that an "immediate, impartial and time-bound investigation" be conducted in the matter

title: Chennai and neighbouring areas to get light to moderate rains over the weekend
content: The RMC has forecast light to moderate rains over a few places in Chennai, Chengalpattu, Kancheepuram, Ranipet, Tiruvallur, Tiruvannamalai, Vellore, and Villupuram districts of Tamil Nadu

title: Two arrested in connection with abduction and murder of minor girl in Sulur
content: Tamil Nadu Chief Minister C. Joseph Vijay on Saturday expressed shock over the incident and said he has instructed the police to conduct a swift and thorough investigation

title: Centre publishes draft rules for VB-G RAM G, invites feedback
content: Framed under Section 33 and other relevant provisions of the Act, the draft rules have been placed in the public domain to facilitate wider stakeholder consultation before they are finalised

title: Delhi Police file 14,000-page supplementary chargesheet in 2023 Parliament breach case
content: The prosecution informed Additional Sessions Judge Amit Bansal that the supplementary chargesheet was filed under Sections 186, 353, 153, 452, 201, 34 and 120B of the IPC, along with Sections 13, 16 and 18 of the UAPA

title: Marco Rubio in India LIVE: After a short visit to Kolkata, U.S. Secretary of State lands in New Delhi
content: U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio is scheduled to hold wide-ranging talks with External Affairs Minister S. Jaishankar, in addition to meeting Prime Minister Narendra Modi and attending a meeting of the Quad Foreign Ministers in New Delhi.

title: U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio arrives in New Delhi to reset strained bilateral relations
content: The two sides are also expected to deliberate on the West Asia crisis and its economic impact, including on energy supplies

title: ‘Ukraine needs to win this war’: Iceland PM says India and Nordics have different views on Russia, but common cause with peace
content: At 38, one of the world’s youngest leaders pitches for Indian film industry to shoot in Iceland, building trade through renewable energy

title: Raghav Chadha appointed chairman of Rajya Sabha Committee on Petitions
content: “The Chairman, Rajya Sabha has, on 20 May 2026, nominated Dr Menaka Guruswamy, Member, Rajya Sabha, to be a member of the Joint Committee on the Corporate Laws [Amendment] Bill, 2026,” says Rajya Sabha secretariat.

title: J&K Forest Minister boycotts own department’s event to protest demolitions in Jammu
content: Javed Rana’s decision to boycott the event reflected a growing rift between the elected government and officials who report to Lieutenant Governor Manoj Sinha directly in J&K

title: Advocate killed after SUV rams into him in suspected hit-and-run case in Hyderabad’s Masab Tank
content: Preliminary investigation indicate the SUV may have been waiting at a short distance away before deliberately targeting the advocate

title: Heritage city must be clean says In-charge Collector Sedhu Madhavan
content: He said that Andhra Pradesh’s Heritage City’s value would be enhanced if it looked good with cleanliness

title: No system to groom political leaders in India; youth must enter public life with awareness: Governor Arlekar
content: Rajendra Arlekar called for serious introspection on the current system and lamented that the country lacks a mechanism to groom its political leaders.

title: Erstwhile BBMP’s stray dog feeding programme in Bengaluru on backburner
content: The project has been put on the backburner mainly due to a lack of interest, which activists say ‘should not have happened’

title: Maharashtra CM Devendra Fadnavis warns against black-marketing of fuel; assures diesel supply for farmers
content: Maharashtra Chief Minister Devendra Fadnavis visited Shirdi to participate in the inauguration function of a defence and aerospace complex

title: Invisible weapons secretly carrying out dangerous attack on country: Akhilesh Yadav
content: The Samajwadi Party chief Akhilesh Yadav, without naming the RSS directly, asked who foots the bills of these ‘sangi-sathi’ illegal associates

title: Fuel price hike: Bengaluru hoteliers feel the heat
content: Almost everything restaurants depend on — vegetables, milk, meat, groceries, cooking supplies, and even laundry materials — arrives through transport networks dependent on diesel.

title: Police halt demolition drive in Jammu briefly to retrieve national flag
content: The incident occurred during an ongoing demolition drive against properties allegedly belonging to a suspected drug peddler, identified as Bablu

title: U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio arrives in Kolkata, visits Saint Teresa’s Mother House
content: U.S Secretary of State Marco Rubio visited Mother House and Nirmala Sishu Bhawan in Kolkata and spent over an hour with the nuns of Missionaries of Charity

title: Apis cerana and Malabar Tree Toad to be declared State insect and amphibian
content: The sandalwood is Karnataka’s State tree, elephant the State animal, the Indian Roller State bird, and Southern Birdwing the State butterfly.

title: Child rights group urges NCPCR to set up WhatsApp helpline for abused children
content: The proposal said once a complaint along with the exact Google Maps location is received, the information should be forwarded to the local police, Labour Department and CWC for action

title: Saffron clashes with green, again
content: On May 15, a Division Bench of the Madhya Pradesh High Court declared the disputed Bhojshala-Kamal Maula complex in Dhar a temple dedicated to goddess Saraswati, based on a survey by the ASI. While Hindus are celebrating the unrestricted access they have been given to the historical monument, Muslims allege that the survey and verdict were predetermined. Mehul Malpani reports from the sensitive town

title: CPI(M) says TMC melting down faster than ice; hopes to take over Opposition space in West Bengal
content: The CPI(M) leader Mohammed Salim said the party will fight for the safety of the minorities and any impending danger to the culture of West Bengal and amity among the people

title: West Bengal gained infamy due to recruitment scams; will bring State out of this situation: CM Suvendu Adhikari
content: Noting that the Calcutta High Court and the Supreme Court had to intervene in these illegalities during the previous TMC government, he said West Bengal's image has suffered

title: Uttar Pradesh Congress chief Ajay Rai booked over 'abusive' remarks against PM Modi
content: A purported video of Ajay Rai went viral on Friday in which he was heard making “abusive” remarks against PM Modi in Mahoba

title: Trinamool’s Kalyan upset with CPI(M)’s Bikash for lawyering for former TMC MLA
content: Without directly naming Bikash Ranjan Bhattacharya, Kalyan Banerjee, who is himself a senior advocate, raised questions on the CPI(M) leader for defending his own party’s former MLA and her husband both of whom “face serious allegations of corruption”.

title: Delhi HC seeks response from AAP’s Gopal Rai, journalist in contempt plea
content: Justice Sharma had on May 14 initiated criminal contempt proceedings against Mr. Kejriwal, Manish Sisodia and other AAP leaders over their “vilifying” social media posts against her in relation to the excise policy case.

title: Twisha Sharma death case: husband Samarth Singh brought to Bhopal, police to seek remand
content: Bhopal Commissioner said local police would continue the investigation until the central agency formally takes over the case; yet to be reached for recording my statement, says Giribala Singh

title: Man reaches Mathura civic body office dressed as cockroach to draw attention to Yamuna pollution
content: Social activist Deepak Sharma wanted to open the eyes of the ‘incompetent’ officials who have virtually turned a blind eye to the Yamuna pollution and the rampant filth in the city

title: Seven MLAs from Chennai find place in Tamil Nadu cabinet: highest in recent years
content: Many top leaders of the TVK decided to contest from Chennai and became Ministers; the previous DMK government had three Ministers from the city, including former Chief Minister M.K. Stalin

title: 19th Rozgar Mela: World wants to become part of India’s ‘Vikas Yatra’, says PM Modi
content: The Prime Minister listed out the agreements signed during his visit to the United Arab Emirates (UAE), the Netherlands, Sweden, Norway, and Italy, and said, “These agreements will directly benefit India’s youth. All these agreements come with a guarantee of a bright and capable India

title: ED arrests Punjab real estate businessman in land fraud case
content: According to the ED, Ajay Sehgal is alleged to have prepared "fake" consent letters with respect to 30.5 acres of land owned by 15 people.

title: Fuel price hike: Petrol in Bengaluru at ₹108.09, diesel at ₹95.99
content: Oil companies had earlier revised prices upward by around ₹3 per litre on May 15, followed by another 90 paise increase on May 19.

title: Army officer’s selfie with crashed helicopter puts spotlight on May 20 ‘accident’ in Ladakh
content: Official sources said the crash site was close to the Line of Actual Control (LAC) in the Shyok River region of Eastern Ladakh bordering China

title: Telangana CM lays foundation stones for development works worth ₹99.55 crore at Yadagirigutta
content: Other projects include construction of a roofed pathway for steps leading from Vaikuntha Dwaram to the hilltop at a cost of ₹1.41 crore and construction of steps towards Mada Veedhi near the Rathashala for ₹1.35 crore

title: Two workers killed, one injured in well-boring accident in Beed
content: The workers were standing on a swing-like platform suspended inside a well to install a horizontal-boring machine when it snapped and plunged into the well, causing the trio to fall, says official

title: NCERT book row: SC recalls ‘harsh’ comments, blacklisting of three academicians
content: The court also observed that its comments were made in context of the contents and not the individuals; the educationists submitted that the March 11 order was passed ex parte, without hearing their side of the story and they said the portions under scrutiny were included in the textbook as a result of a collective decision

title: Are cartoons in NCERT textbooks proper? Supreme Court asks retired judge panel to review
content: The order came after Solicitor General Tushar Mehta raised the issue and said 'textbook is not a place where you use cartoons'

title: Ponraj gets anticipatory bail in two cases over derogatory remarks against TVK’s women supporters
content: Justice R. Sakthivel says the petitioner, who claims to be a respectable personality, should have been very careful with his choice of words while giving interviews

title: Uttar Pradesh woman killed by boyfriend after she refuses to accompany him
content: The incident took place in the presence of family members on May 22, at Sonta Rasulpur village in Uttar Pradesh's Shamli district

title: Nagaland intensifies ASF containment measures; pork sale banned in several districts
content: In Dimapur district, authorities have identified infected and surveillance zones after ASF-positive cases were confirmed in pigs at Signal Angami village

title: Punjab government to remove stray dogs from high footfall public spaces following Supreme Court order
content: Bhagwant Mann said the government will create and maintain an adequate number of dog shelters where stray dogs can be properly cared for

title: Watch: Vijay’s Tamil Nadu cabinet has 8 ministers from the SC community, a historic first
content: Among all the Cabinets formed in Tamil Nadu so far, the one led by Chief Minister C. Joseph Vijay features the highest number of Ministers from the Scheduled Caste (SC) community with eight persons getting ministerial berths. We look back at the repesentation of the SC community in TN governments going back to 1937, when the region was known as Madras Presidency.

title: Bihar government announces free bus travel for students appearing for NEET re-examination
content: The Chief Minister did not mention whether the free bus travel facility will be available only on the examination day or for the period up to the test day

title: From prison cells to exam halls: 44 Gujarat inmates pass GSEB Board examinations
content: The Prison Department assisted inmates with filling examination forms, supplied books and study materials, and conducted subject-wise classes inside prison facilities.

title: Exploring Shekhawati: Rajasthan’s open-air art gallery of frescoed havelis
content: Journey through Shekhawati, where frescoed havelis, historic towns, and cultural festivals trace the afterlife of a mercantile desert civilisation

title: Supreme Court orders immediate FIRs in missing person cases, activation of anti-trafficking units within 4 weeks
content: Police stations were directed to immediately register FIRs, incorporating offences under the Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita, 2023, relating to kidnapping and trafficking, the moment information regarding a missing person is received

title: Bengal CM on first visit to Delhi after taking charge, meets President, Prime Minister and Home Minister
content: The West Bengal Chief Minister posted on social media that the Prime Minister Narendra Modi re-emphasized his vision of Sabka Saath, Sabka Vikas and reiterated that the development of West Bengal remains a top priority for the Central Government.

title: How Tagore’s songs were ahead of their time in form and feeling
content: The Nobel-laureate’s songs, popularly referred to as Rabindra Sangeet, are dynamic texts open to reinterpretation, allowing each generation to find new meaning in themes of freedom, love, and humanity — revisiting the Tagore’s musical oeuvre on his 165th birth anniversary

title: Ahead of SIR, 75% of voters mapped with 2003 rolls in Jharkhand: CEO
content: The list of all unmapped voters will be displayed at all polling booths from Saturday (May 23, 2026), he said

title: Rubio's maiden India visit aims to repair strained ties; boost Quad cooperation
content: The top U.S. diplomat is scheduled to hold wide-ranging talks with External Affairs Minister S. Jaishankar, in addition to meeting Prime Minister Narendra Modi and attending a meeting of the Quad Foreign Ministers in New Delhi

title: Twisha Sharma death case: husband taken into custody, M.P. HC allows second autopsy
content: Earlier, Samarth Singh reached the Jabalpur district court on the evening of May 22, to surrender, his lawyer said; the anticipatory bail application was filed before the high court on May 21, 2026, after a subordinate court turned down his plea last week

title: Centre promised more legislative powers for Ladakh, says delegation
content: Home Ministry officials have proposed a new mechanism within the existing Union Territory framework, say representatives from the Leh Apex Body and the Kargil Democratic Alliance

title: Marco Rubio India Visit Live Updates: Top Trump Aide To Meet PM Modi Shortly
content: Marco Rubio India Visit Live Updates: The top US diplomat is scheduled to hold talks with External Affairs Minister S Jaishankar and attend a meeting of the Quad foreign ministers.

title: Guwahati Couple Posed As House Help, Gained Trust And Then Robbed Them
content: According to police, the accused used fake names and addresses to get jobs in homes before targeting the families.

title: TCS Ties Monthly Variable Pay To Attendance, Staff Fear Lower Take-Home: Report
content: The variable pay for those working from office has now been shifted to a monthly "performance pay" component to be tied to attendance and deployment metrics, said employees.

title: Twisha Sharma Death Case Updates: Bar Council Suspends Samarth Singh From Legal Practice
content: Twisha Sharma Death Updates: The case came under scrutiny as the Madhya Pradesh Police faced criticism for an inefficient probe into the case, while Giribala Singh was accused of exerting undue influence.

title: Telangana Woman Found Dead, Husband Accused Of Murder For 1 Crore Insurance
content: While the case initially appeared to be a suicide, injury marks on her body and her family's allegations raised doubts about the circumstances of her death, prompting a detailed investigation.

title: Video: Water Leaks Inside Pune Metro Coach After Heavy Rain
content: The viral video from the Pune Metro showed commuters packed inside the coach during the evening rush as rainwater leaked from the ceiling.

title: Tulsi Gabbard Was Forced To Quit As Intel Chief? What White House Said
content: Gabbard, 45, said she was quitting as Director of National Intelligence to care for her husband, Abraham Williams, after he was recently diagnosed with an "extremely rare form of bone cancer."

title: Ukraine's "Call Of Duty" Style War System Rewards Troops For Russian Kills
content: The system, called ePoints and launched in 2024, tracks battlefield performance using data submitted by Ukrainian units.

title: Iraqi Man Had Plotted Ivanka Trump's Killing, Was Seeking "Revenge": Report
content: Mohammad Baqer Saad Dawood Al-Saadi had allegedly pledged to kill Ivanka in retaliation for the 2020 US drone strike in Baghdad.

title: Bengaluru Boxing Coach Accused Of Sexually Harassing Student For 4 Years
content: The complaint alleges that the coach allegedly called the minor girl to his private room, touched her private parts, forcibly kissed her and behaved inappropriately.

title: "Kill Yourself": JPMorgan Executive Gets Abusive Texts After "Sex Slave" Case
content: Lorna Hajdini accused Chirayu Rana of inventing claims of sexual harassment and attempting to damage her reputation for “leverage to extort millions of dollars.”

title: Marco Rubio Visits Saint Teresa's Mother House, Children's Home In Kolkata
content: Marco Rubio's arrival in Kolkata ended a 14-year gap since a US secretary of state last visited the city.

title: India's Fuel Price Hike Still The Lowest Across The World
content: India is the only major economy in the world to have held kept fuel prices unchanged through the first 76 days of the Hormuz disruption, the government said.

title: How Urban India's Weekend Obsession Became A $50 Million Market
content: Industry estimates peg India's pickleball market at nearly Rs 7,500 crore by 2030. Just two years ago, the sport barely existed outside niche circles.

title: Opinion: Opinion | Rubio Is In India, But Trump's America Just Launched Its Sharpest Attack On Indian Immigrants
content: As US Secretary of State Marco Rubio arrives in India for the Quad meeting and strategic consultations, the Trump administration is preparing one of the sharpest reversals of long-standing American immigration policy in decades.

title: Lucknow Doctor Arrested For Raping Patient Inside Operation Theatre
content: Lucknow, May 23 (IANS) A hospital operator and doctor accused of sexually assaulting a female patient inside an Operation Theatre during treatment at Tejas Hospital in Lucknow has been arrested, officials said on Saturday.
